title: App Settings - General - Licenses
scenario: Verify that "Third-party Software" headline and its licenses with Source and License links are visible under App Settings > General > Licenses, and also appear in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
steps: Verify that the 'Third-party Software' headline is visible.
Check that a list of licenses is displayed below the headline.
For each license, confirm that a Source link is present.
For each license, confirm that a License link is present.
Verify that the same licenses appear in this section.
expected: Under App Settings > General > Licenses, the "Third-party Software" headline is visible with a list of licenses. Each license displays both a Source link and a License link. The same licenses also appear in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
